svg.title: PRISM scoring architecture
svg.desc: Six sub-score input modules on the left combine through context-weighted aggregation into five evaluation grade outputs on the right. Click any node to explore.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should PRISM score physical crystal quality across different mineral species?')
sendPrompt('How should PRISM calculate the rarity index from Mindat occurrence data?')
sendPrompt('How should PRISM evaluate provenance documentation and legal collection status?')
sendPrompt('How should PRISM normalize market price signals across specimen quality tiers?')
sendPrompt('How should PRISM use AI image analysis to score specimen aesthetics?')
sendPrompt('How should PRISM assess scientific value including type locality status?')
sendPrompt('How should PRISM weight the six sub-scores differently for each evaluation context?')
sendPrompt('What weight profile should Museum grade use in PRISM? Provenance and scientific value should dominate.')
sendPrompt('What weight profile should Exhibition grade use in PRISM? Aesthetics and crystal quality should dominate.')
sendPrompt('What weight profile should Collector grade use in PRISM? Crystal quality and rarity should dominate.')
sendPrompt('What weight profile should Study grade use in PRISM? Scientific value and provenance should dominate.')
sendPrompt('What weight profile should Commercial grade use in PRISM? Market price and crystal quality should dominate.')
